node.name: Niagara Falls Day Trip
node.description: Full-day excursion to Niagara Falls. Includes bus transportation, Hornblower boat ride, and time_block to explore the falls. Outdoor scenic adventure, weather dependent.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "outdoor") on Niagara Falls Day Trip (Score: 1.00)

node.name: Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride
node.description: Ferry ride to Toronto Islands followed by bike rental and exploration. Outdoor nature activity with beaches, gardens, and stunning skyline views. Perfect for families and kids.

context_trace.node_name: Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride
context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "outdoor") on Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride (Score: 1.00)
